channel.title: Idor on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Idor on Classroom

item.title: Burp Academy: Broken Access Control - Complete Guide
item.description: Broken Access Control is #1 on the OWASP Top 10 (A01:2021) — and it’s the single most common high-impact finding in real bug bounty and pentest work. This post consolidates the PortSwigger Web Security Academy “Access control vulnerabilities” labs into one technique-by-technique reference, with the exact exploitation for each.

item.title: 30 PortSwigger Labs Solved — A Bug Bounty Training Marathon
item.description: 30 PortSwigger Web Security Academy labs solved in a single session — covering SSRF, SQLi, SSTI, XXE, IDOR, CSRF, CORS, NoSQL injection, deserialization, WebSocket XSS, file upload, LLM attacks, and more. Key payloads and bug bounty tips for each.

item.title: Exposing a User Enumeration Vulnerability in e-Jagriti’s findUser Endpoint
item.description: Exposing a User Enumeration Vulnerability in e-Jagriti's findUser Endpoint — OWASP bug bounty report by Animesh Roy.
